apple-standard.comment: Apple HIG standard — ease-out feel. Natural deceleration into resting state.

enter.comment: Elements entering viewport. Fast start, smooth arrival.

exit.comment: Elements exiting. Immediate start, clean departure. Always faster than enter.

linear.comment: Linear — use only for opacity fades where easing feels unnatural. Not for transforms.

fast.comment: Micro-interactions: hover state, focus ring appearance, button press feedback. Must be imperceptible.

base.comment: Standard element transitions: cards expanding, content loading, state changes within view.

slow.comment: Complex transitions: modal open, bottom sheet slide-up, page-level element reveals.

exit-fast.comment: Exit paired with fast — 60% of 150ms. Hover-out, focus-blur.

exit-base.comment: Exit paired with base — 60% of 250ms. Standard exit transition.

exit-slow.comment: Exit paired with slow — 60% of 400ms. Modal close, sheet dismiss.

list-item.comment: Stagger delay between list/grid items entering. 30-50ms range. Avoids 'all at once' or 'too slow' reveal.

press.comment: Scale on card/button tap press. Subtle physical feedback. Restore on release with ease-apple-standard.
